questions.neuro_deficit: Have you noticed any new leg weakness, numbness, or difficulty walking?
questions.bowel_bladder: Are you having any new problems peeing or controlling your bowel or bladder?
questions.fever: Do you have a fever or chills?
questions.trauma_cancer: Have you had any major injuries, cancer, or used IV drugs?
questions.duration: How long have you had the back pain? Days, weeks, or months?
